content.en:
Wow!

The Devouring Clan's side witnessed Ye Tian's terrifying strength, and immediately sent three more Ten Thousand Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestors, and a full five Ten Thousand Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestors to besiege Ye Tian.

However, this is not enough.

After a while, the Devouring Clan's side once again sent a Ten Thousand Things Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor, and a full six Ten Thousand Things Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestors fought against Ye Tian.

In the battle at the half-step domain ancestor level in the realm of all things, the side from Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm is not weak, at least if Ye Tian is there, he can still control a little initiative.

But at the ordinary half-step domain ancestor level, the Xuanxu to the ancient realm is completely at a disadvantage, and even the invincible Dao ancestors need to form a large array to compete against a half-step domain ancestor level devouring clan.

After all, the Devouring Clan now has nearly a hundred Half-Step Domain Ancestor level Devouring Clans, and the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm is now only a half-step Domain Ancestor, and the Heavenly Emperor Palace and the Black Wind Mountain add up to more than thirty.

Therefore, the ordinary half-step domain ancestor level was not at the same level at all.

The number of Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestors is insufficient, so they can only use the Invincible Dao Ancestor level to supplement their combat power.

On a battlefield.

A half-step domain ancestor level devouring clan fought with the battle array formed by six invincible Dao ancestors, and after a while, these six invincible Dao ancestors couldn't hold on, and they were directly blown up, falling and dying on the spot.

In addition to the invincible Dao Ancestors, there were also a lot of fallen Supreme Dao Ancestors, and some of the Supreme Dao Ancestors combined to form a large array of thousands to resist the half-step domain ancestors, which could only last for a while.

As a result, a large number of Supreme Dao Ancestors and Invincible Dao Ancestors fell, and the entire Chaotic Void was full of Dao Ancestor's corpses.

And the invincible Dao ancestors of the Devouring Clan have also fallen one by one, their strength is insufficient, and there is no human touch among the Devouring Clan, even if other Devouring Clans are in danger, they will not risk to rescue.

Therefore, the invincible Dao ancestors of the Devouring Clan will fall one by one.

In terms of losses, the losses from Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm are even greater.

Ye Tian on the battlefield.

He once again attacked with all his strength, if he hid his strength again, a large number of supreme Dao Ancestors and invincible Dao Ancestors would fall.

"The power of the Extreme Dao has exploded!"

Ye Tian exerted the power of the Extreme Dao, and a blow pierced through the body of another Ten Thousand Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor, this Ten Thousand Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor was slightly weaker, so he was directly killed in an instant.

Then, Ye Tian went on a killing spree again, and in a short period of time, he killed three Devouring Clans of the Half Step Domain Ancestor Level of the Ten Thousand Things Realm, shocking the audience.

The Devouring Clan didn't expect Ye Tian's strength to be so terrifying, and it actually broke their cognition!

After all, Ye Tian's realm is also invincible at the Dao Ancestor level, and he can burst out with the combat power of the half-step domain ancestor of the Ten Thousand Realm, which is already extremely against the sky, and now he continues to burst out with a combat power comparable to the half-step domain ancestor of the Guiyi Realm, is this still a cultivator?

In a short period of time, the Devouring Clan had lost four Ten Thousand Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestors one after another, which was a huge loss for the Devouring Clan.

-------------

"White Deer Emperor Ancestor, the people of the Ten Thousand Things Realm have suffered heavy losses, and we have been pinned down again. If this continues, although the Dao Ancestors of the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm will suffer heavy casualties, our Devouring Clan will also suffer heavy losses. The number of our people is small, and it is a huge loss to die a single one!"

The Blood Emperor Ancestor sent a message to the White Deer Emperor Ancestor, Dao.

The White Deer Emperor Ancestor was also very anxious, thinking that it would not be difficult to devour the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm, but he never expected that this would be a difficult bone to gnaw, and it would also break their teeth.

According to this trend, they will not be able to swallow the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm at all!

"Wake up the Frost Heaven Emperor Ancestor!"

The White Deer Emperor Ancestor passed the message to the other three Emperor Ancestors.

"What, wake up that guy in Frost Sky, he's a madman!"

The Blood Emperor Ancestor was shocked.

Although he was also more crazy, he was far less crazy than the guy from the Frost Heaven Emperor Ancestor.

That guy devoured the unpleasant clansmen without saying a word, and even provoked the domain ancestors in the clan, so he was suppressed by the domain ancestors and sealed in the devouring realm, and their four great emperor ancestors were responsible for guarding the frost heaven emperor ancestors.

I have to say that the strength of the Frost Heaven Emperor Ancestor is very strong, even stronger than the White Deer Emperor Ancestor.

Because the Frost Heaven Emperor Ancestor is almost an outlier, not only the Devouring Clan, but also very talented in cultivation, and has also comprehended the Forbidden Dao and the Forbidden Dao Technique, and his combat power far exceeds that of the ordinary Returning One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor Devouring Clan.

Therefore, once the Frost Heaven Emperor Ancestor arrived, the Devouring Clan would be able to win.

Of course, once the Frost Heaven Emperor Ancestor was born, their lives would not be easy, and no one would want to live with such a madman.

"What about the madman, once we take down the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm, we can be promoted to Domain Ancestor. The Domain Ancestors have left us a road map, we can completely leave this realm and go to the depths of the Dark Forbidden Domain to pursue a higher realm, and we don't have to stay with that guy from the Frost Heaven Emperor Ancestor at all!"

White Deer Emperor Ancestral Road.

"That's right!"

The other three emperors agreed.

......

Devouring Realm.

In a dark void, the four great emperor ancestors left a trace of origin here, and these origin incarnations turned into four incarnations at this moment.

"Open the seal!"

The White Deer Emperor Ancestor incarnated and said.

Immediately, the four emperor ancestor incarnations worked together to open the seal.

Click!!

The void shattered, and a figure walked out of the endless chaos of time and space.

This person is none other than the Frost Heaven Emperor Ancestor!

"White deer, blood, war, Wan Zhen, you four guys actually opened the seal, aren't you afraid that the domain ancestors will blame you?"

The Frost Heaven Emperor Ancestor wondered.

"Frost Heaven Emperor Ancestors, the Domain Ancestors have already left this realm. Now that a new civilization has been born in this realm, and a very powerful world has been born, once that world is swallowed, we can be promoted to the rank of domain ancestor. But the cultivators of that world are very strong, and although we have an advantage, they have an extra Returning Realm half-step domain ancestor combat power, so in terms of high-end strength, we are a little weak!"

White Deer Emperor Ancestral Road.

"So, you released me to help you?"

Frost Heaven Emperor Ancestor said with a smile.

"Yes, this is also a good thing for you anyway, and there are a large number of cultivators here that you can kill!" "The White Deer Emperor Ancestor knew the temperament of the Frost Heaven Emperor Ancestor, so he said that there were a large number of cultivators here.

Sure enough.

When the Frost Heaven Emperor Ancestor heard this, his expression moved, and he said, "Okay, I'll go over now, where is the location?"

After the White Deer Emperor Ancestor said the location, he urged the Frost Heaven Emperor Ancestor to hurry over.

But at this moment, the Frost Heaven Emperor Ancestor waved his hand and directly killed the incarnation of the Four Great Emperor Ancestors.

"Hehe, you have been guarding me for so long, and it's not too much for me to kill your incarnation, right?"

Frost Heaven Emperor Ancestor sneered.
